languages.text: {n}Оптика Ферренца с жужжанием фокусируется на вас.{/n} "Сканирую потенциальную полезность жизнеформы... Навык энцефалического врачевания отсутствует. В данный момент — ничем".
{n}With a whirring sound, Ferrenz's optical augment focuses on you.{/n} "Scanning for the potential utility of the life form... Encephalic healing skill is lacking. At present, nothing can be done."
languages.original_text: {n}Оптика Ферренца с жужжанием фокусируется на вас.{/n} "Сканирую потенциальную полезность жизнеформы... Навык энцефалического врачевания отсутствует. В данный момент — ничем".

traits.locale_text: {n}With a whirring sound, Ferrenz's optical augment focuses on you.{/n} "Scanning for the potential utility of the life form... Encephalic healing skill is lacking. At present, nothing can be done."

{n}With a whirring sound, Ferrenz's optical augment focuses on you.{/n} "Scanning for the potential utility of the life form... Encephalic healing skill is lacking. At present, nothing can be done."

languages.text: {n}Mit einem surrenden Geräusch fokussiert dich Ferrenz mit seiner optischen Augmentation.{/n} "Scanne den potenziellen Nutzen der Lebensform ... Noch keine nennenswerte Genesung des Gehirns. Derzeit können wir nichts tun."
languages.original_text: {n}With a whirring sound, Ferrenz's optical augment focuses on you.{/n} "Scanning for the potential utility of the life form... Encephalic healing skill is lacking. At present, nothing can be done."

traits.locale_text: {n}Mit einem surrenden Geräusch fokussiert dich Ferrenz mit seiner optischen Augmentation.{/n} "Scanne den potenziellen Nutzen der Lebensform ... Noch keine nennenswerte Genesung des Gehirns. Derzeit können wir nichts tun."

languages.text: {n}L'augmentation optique de Ferrenz se focalise sur vous avec un vrombissement.{/n} « Estimation de l'utilité potentielle de l'entité... Compétence en matière de médecine neurologique inexistante. À l'heure actuelle, il n'y a rien que vous puissiez faire. »
languages.original_text: {n}With a whirring sound, Ferrenz's optical augment focuses on you.{/n} "Scanning for the potential utility of the life form... Encephalic healing skill is lacking. At present, nothing can be done."

traits.locale_text: {n}L'augmentation optique de Ferrenz se focalise sur vous avec un vrombissement.{/n} « Estimation de l'utilité potentielle de l'entité... Compétence en matière de médecine neurologique inexistante. À l'heure actuelle, il n'y a rien que vous puissiez faire. »

languages.text: {n}伴随着一阵嗡鸣，费伦茨的光学植入物聚焦在你身上。{/n}“正在扫描该生命体的潜在价值……脑部修复能力不足。就目前而言，无计可施。”
languages.original_text: {n}With a whirring sound, Ferrenz's optical augment focuses on you.{/n} "Scanning for the potential utility of the life form... Encephalic healing skill is lacking. At present, nothing can be done."

traits.locale_text: {n}伴随着一阵嗡鸣，费伦茨的光学植入物聚焦在你身上。{/n}“正在扫描该生命体的潜在价值……脑部修复能力不足。就目前而言，无计可施。”

languages.text: {n}Con un zumbido, el aumento óptico de Ferrenz se fija en ti.{/n} «Analizando posible utilidad de la forma de vida... Habilidad de tratamiento encefálico insuficiente. En este momento, no se puede hacer nada».
languages.original_text: {n}With a whirring sound, Ferrenz's optical augment focuses on you.{/n} "Scanning for the potential utility of the life form... Encephalic healing skill is lacking. At present, nothing can be done."

traits.locale_text: {n}Con un zumbido, el aumento óptico de Ferrenz se fija en ti.{/n} «Analizando posible utilidad de la forma de vida... Habilidad de tratamiento encefálico insuficiente. En este momento, no se puede hacer nada».

languages.text: {n}テクノサイエンティストが負傷した男性に寄りかかっているVIDEOがあなたの方を向いている。{/n}「生命体の潜在的有用性をスキャンしています。神経外科の技術はありません。現時点ではありません。
languages.original_text: {n}The vids of the techno-scientist leaning over the wounded man turn to you.{/n} "Scanning the potential usefulness of the lifeform... No neurosurgery skills. None at this time."

languages.text: {n}Bir uğultu, Ferrenz'in optik ogmenti sana odaklandığını işaret ediyor.{/n} "Yaşam formunun potansiyel faydası taranıyor... Beyin iyileştirme becerisi eksik. Şu anda yapılabilecek hiçbir şey yok."
languages.original_text: {n}With a whirring sound, Ferrenz's optical augment focuses on you.{/n} "Scanning for the potential utility of the life form... Encephalic healing skill is lacking. At present, nothing can be done."
